---
title: "摄影馈敐"
subtitle: "时光捕捉的片段。"
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
  loop: true
---

<style>
  .quarto-figure img {
    border-radius: 8px;              /* 圆角 */
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); /* 柔和阴影 */
    transition: transform 0.3s ease; /* 动画过渡 */
  }
  .quarto-figure img:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px);     /* 鼠标悬停时上浮 */
    box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); /* 悬停时阴影加深 */
  }
  /* 隐藏原本在图片下方的文字(文件名)，除非你在[]里写了特定的描述 */
  figcaption {
    display: none; 
  }
</style>

Welcome to my gallery.

欢迎来到我的照片馆。

### 风景与城市景观

::: {layout-ncol=2}

![](images/gallery/gallery-01.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-04.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-05.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-06.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-07.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](images/gallery/gallery-02.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

:::

<br>

### 竖体透视

::: {layout-ncol=3}


![](images/gallery/gallery-03.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

:::

<br>

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
点击任何图片以展开。
:::
